metadata.description: Pantheon: a local, OAuth-only delegation mesh that lets Claude Code, Grok Build, and Codex hand work to each other on one machine. No API keys. Claude routes visual work to Grok Imagine, any agent can ask another for a second opinion or implementation, with a loop guard and read-only-by-default write gate.

plugins.name: grok
plugins.description: Bridge to Grok Build: /grok-imagine for all image+video generation/editing, /grok-review for multi-agent delegation. Local OAuth only, no API keys.
